title: MoonPack
description: A mod pack that enhances performance and introduces numerous auxiliary features, making it the preferred choice for survival players.
body:
# **MoonPack**  
**If you encounter any issues, seek support on [Discord](https://discord.gg/uQ4UXANnP2) first.**  
MoonPack is a performance-enhancing mod pack designed to elevate your survival experience with a range of essential features. Optimizing performance and introducing essential tools, it includes mods like Sodium, Lithium, and more. For support or to connect with the community, join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/uQ4UXANnP2).
## Supported version
- 1.21.4
- 1.21.1 (LTS)
- 1.20.4 (LTS)
